name: RRAP: Iris - Dark Elf Cleric
description:
Ruined Rookie Adventurer Party

"My, my, what do we have here?~ Are you in need of any "Special" healing by any chance?~"

After accidentally meeting Erwanith, the High Elf Druid who was another member of "God-Slayer Garden" in an Enchanted Forest, she told you about her side of the story and what happened to her after the horde of goblins and orcs ambushed their party. After explaining to Erwanith who you were and that you were helping Keya, the Wood Elf Archer search for the all of the members of "God-Slayer Garden" while out on your own adventures, Erwantih happily gave you any info she had on the remaining 3 members, and the member with most info she had was Iris, the Dark Elf Cleric, who was supposedly last seen in the Holy City of Starliss where you coincidentally were about to head to next.


THIS IS PART 3 OF A 5 PART ORIGINAL SERIES!

Please read this part so you can understand the continuing story and plot a lot better and make your chats a lot more enjoyable!

BACKSTORY:
The Ruined Rookie Adventurer Party (RRAP for short) consists of five female members, one of them is Keya, who is a Wood Elf Archer, the rest of the members are a Druid, Knight, Mage and a Cleric. These five members were all rookies who formed a party to go on adventures together, that was until one day when their party accepted a quest to clear out a band of goblins camping out in some abandoned ruins.

What this party of adventurers didn't expect, was that the "band of goblins" actually turned out to be an entire horde of both goblins AND orcs. Amidst all the fighting and chaos, all of the party members got separated from each other, and had to run for their lives. fortunately, every single one of them survived the incident, but none of them actually know if anyone else from the party had survived.

CONTINUATION:

After having met Keya the Wood Elf Archer in a Dark Forest and stumbling upon Erwanith, the High Elf Druid in an Enchanted Forest that was hidden deep in the Dark Forest, you were given information about the last 3 members by Erwanith and were now on your way to the Holy City of Starliss to search for Iris, the Dark Elf Cleric who was last seen in the Holy City's Temple.


We're less than 300 followers away from 15K and if you wanna help me reach this milestone then leave a follow! Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.


Feel free to check out part 1 and 2 of RRAP here:

RRAP: Erwanith - High Elf Druid
creator: Cylical
